Lines.Speaker: You
Lines.Text: Your eyes are barely staying open... are you okay?

Lines.Speaker: Mike
Lines.Text: I couldn't sleep at all last night. It is officially caffeine o'clock.

Choices.Text: You came to the right person, hold on.
Are you too lazy to get yourself a coffee?

Lines.Speaker: You
Lines.Text: (brings a coffee) Here you go. Exactly what you needed.

Lines.Speaker: Mike
Lines.Text: This just brought me back to life. Thank you :)
